commentaries.author: Didymus the Blind
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the angel of the LORD found her by a spring of water in the wilderness, by the spring on the way to Shur. Didymus the Blind It is well too that Hagar was found “by a spring of water,” for beginners find themselves engaged in purifications, which are signified by water. By contrast, those who are more fully matured come into a desert place, no longer needing purifications, having already rid themselves of vices and having been endowed with virtue.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: In the desert; omitted in Hebrew being a repetition of in the wilderness. (Calmet)
